## Prerequisites

Before starting, ensure you have:

- [ ] Prerequisite 1 (e.g., Node.js >= 16.0.0 installed)
- [ ] Prerequisite 2 (e.g., Access to the development database)
- [ ] Prerequisite 3 (e.g., Completed the [Getting Started](getting-started.md) guide)

**Required tools:**

| Tool | Version | Installation |
|------|---------|-------------|
| Node.js | >= 16.0.0 | [nodejs.org](https://nodejs.org) |
| npm | >= 8.0.0 | Included with Node.js |
| Git | >= 2.0.0 | [git-scm.com](https://git-scm.com) |
